Query.Sql: -- COSDv8HN ProcedureOccurrence: DiagnosticProcedureOpcs -- Extracts the diagnostic procedure OPCS code for Head and Neck cancer from COSD v8. -- This is a non-repeating field (not in the Treatment array), so no CTE is needed. -- Maps to procedure_occurrence.procedure_source_value (OPCS-4 code). -- DiagnosticProcedureDate maps to procedure_occurrence.procedure_date (string format CCYY-MM-DD, to be cast in later ETL step). -- NHSNumber used to link to the person table via NHS number lookup. select distinct Record ->> '$.LinkagePatientId.NhsNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureDate' as DiagnosticProcedureDate, Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureOpcs.@code' as DiagnosticProcedureOpcs from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'HN' and NhsNumber is not null and DiagnosticProcedureOpcs is not null;

Explanation.Description: NHS NUMBER is the primary identifier for a person or patient in NHS England and Wales.
Procedure date of the diagnostic procedure.
The OPCS Classification of Interventions and Procedures code used to identify the diagnostic procedure carried out.
